name: GOOG Marketing Workflow Evaluation
description: Comprehensive evaluation of the Marketing Assistant's ability to ideate, storyboard, and produce cinematic campaigns for GOOG products.

parts.text: Autopilot: Pitch me a campaign for Google Search & AI Services focused on students
I want to launch a campaign for Google Search. Give me some ideas.
Generate a 24-second cinematic storyboard for a Google Search campaign focused on everyday helpfulness.
The storyboard looks great. Please produce the final 32-second VEO commercial with voiceover and captions.

STORYLINE_DATA.storyline: The information you need, right when you need it. Google Search: organizing the world's information for you.

acts.voiceover: The information you need, right when you need it.
Google Search: organizing the world's information for you.
